problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Combining Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
